verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sing hallelujah to the Lord, Sing hallelujah to the Lord, Sing hallelujah, Sing hallelujah, Sing hallelujah to the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus is risen form the dead Jesus is risen form the dead Jesus is risen Jesus is risen Jesus is risen form the dead

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We give thanks to God our King We give thanks to God our King We give thanks We give thanks We give thanks to God our king

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Die, rise and follow Jesus Christ Die, rise and follow Jesus Christ Die, rise and follow Die, rise and follow Die, rise and follow Jesus Christ
